vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group

triage_decision.reason: Adjusting /etc/group permissions to 0644 is a standard STIG remediation that does not impact login mechanisms or critical services. The change is limited to file metadata and is unlikely to cause lockout or system instability.
